name: xdm_desktop_productivity_fixed_overlay
description: Implements the high-value desktop UX phase with Avalonia 12-compatible tray, flyout, and data-transfer access, plus native multi-selection, context actions, undoable history removal, notification center, drag and drop, command palette, tray controls, compact window, advanced search discoverability, and persisted workspace preferences.
constraints: Require zero warnings and zero errors
Preserve reliable-transfer, diagnostics, browser-integration, media, queue, and organization behavior
Keep history undo bounded and do not delete completed files for history-only removal
Keep notification and preference storage bounded or best-effort so UI features cannot interrupt transfers
Do not weaken per-download desktop-notification controls or clipboard review defaults
Resolve application tray icons through TrayIcon.GetIcons(Application), not generated XAML fields
Resolve button flyouts through Button.Flyout, not generated Flyout names
Use IDataTransfer.TryGetFiles for Avalonia 12 drag-and-drop file extraction
